name: ORCID Researcher Identifier API
what_it_does: ORCID REST API for researcher identification and scholarly record management. Enables AI agents to look up researcher profiles by ORCID iD, retrieve publication and funding records, read and write researcher work records with proper authorization, and integrate researcher identity into academic research discovery and publication management workflows. ORCID provides persistent unique identifiers for researchers.
use_cases: Resolving researcher identities from academic research discovery agents
Retrieving publication and funding records from scholarly analytics agents
Writing research outputs to researcher profiles from institutional repository agents
Disambiguating authors across publications from research intelligence agents
not_for: Commercial entity data (ORCID is for individual researchers only)
Non-academic publication metadata without researcher identity context
Bulk commercial data harvesting without scholarly purpose
best_when: A research institution, publisher, or academic platform wants AI agents to resolve researcher identities, enrich publication metadata with ORCID iDs, and integrate researcher profiles into research information systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Researcher profiles may contain personal information. Write access requires explicit researcher authorization via OAuth. Public API has open access but write access is consent-based.

auth.notes: ORCID Public API: no auth required for reading public data. ORCID Member API: client credentials for reading member-visible data; OAuth authorization code for writing to researcher profiles (requires researcher consent). Scopes: /read-public, /activities/update, /person/update.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public API: free, no registration required; Member API: free for non-profit research organizations
pricing.paid_tiers: ORCID Membership for commercial organizations; pricing per organization type
pricing.notes: Non-profit organization. Public API is fully open. Member API for institutions wanting to write to profiles. Open source infrastructure.

performance.rate_limits: Public API: rate-limited per IP; Member API: per client credentials

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with two tiers (Public and Member)
Write access requires per-researcher OAuth authorization — cannot bulk-update without consent
Public API has IP-based rate limiting — use Member API for production integrations
ORCID iD format is 16-digit number with hyphens (0000-0000-0000-0000)
Data model uses works, funding, education — understand the schema before integration
GDPR: researcher profile data; respect researcher's visibility settings (public/trusted parties/private)
agent_readiness.security_notes: Researcher identity and scholarly records. GDPR. Non-profit open infrastructure. Write access requires explicit researcher OAuth consent. Public read data is open.

security_score_components.security_notes: Researcher identity data. GDPR. Consent-based write access. Non-profit open infrastructure. Scope-based OAuth for write operations.
